verdict_reasoning: GRM4 is a metabotropic glutamate receptor (mGlu4) belonging to the GPCR superfamily. As a 7-transmembrane G protein-coupled receptor, it has multiple extracellular loops and a large extracellular N-terminal ligand-binding domain that recognizes and binds L-glutamate in the extracellular space. The protein is stably resident on the cell surface by virtue of its transmembrane topology.
